transcribe.ffmpegMissingDesc: FFmpeg is required to extract audio from video files. On Linux, install it with your package manager. On Windows, download it from ffmpeg.org and add it to PATH.
transcribe.newTranscriptionDesc: Clear all fields, logs, and results to start a new transcription
transcribe.comingSoonDesc: Automatic speech-to-text transcription powered by Whisper AI. Generate subtitles directly from audio or video files.
transcribe.feature1: Local Whisper AI processing - no cloud required
transcribe.feature2: Support for multiple languages and accents
flashcards.title: Flashcard Generation
flashcards.subtitle: Create Anki cards from subtitles with audio and images (subs2srs alternative)
flashcards.targetLangSubsDesc: Subtitle file in the original language spoken in the movie or episode
flashcards.nativeLangSubsDesc: Subtitle file in a language you already know, used as translation/reference
flashcards.mediaFileDesc: Video = audio clips + screenshots. Audio = audio clips only
